examples: After drink they back home by pursuing the crowd bus, eating the cheapest meal. All his (her) money waste on his peacockery.
They generally have personal bias in various degrees, such as laziness, blinkered peacockery, anxiety, depression, and self-abasement.
They know what life and sentiment they need in deed, they could strive for their future, but they shouldn't give up themselves for some peacockery.
